evidence.title: Experience with the Kosmos ultrasonographic tool in the approach and treatment of ambulatory patients of a heart failure clinic: a single-center cross-sectional study.

safety_events.narrative_text: ECHONOUS NOTIFIED FDA OF A VOLUNTARY RECALL ON (B)(6) 2024, WITHIN 10 WORKING DAYS FROM AWARENESS. FDA INITIATED RECALL RES 94709 ON (B)(6), 2024. TO DATE, ECHONOUS HAS RECEIVED NO COMPLAINTS RELATED TO THIS ISSUE. GIVEN THERE WAS POTENTIAL FOR SERIOUS INJURY, THIS MDR IS BEING SUBMITTED.

recalls.reason: Ultrasound system has a bug in affected iOS software, which after DICOM export, can cause inaccuracy in postprocessed measurements done in 3rd party software, such as PACS or other post-processing software, which may lead to inaccurate diagnoses or treatment.
recalls.product_description: Kosmos on iOS impacting iOS, Model Numbers: P007639, P007944, software is part of a general-purpose diagnostic ultrasound system.
